title: Trims on Tools
description: More use for trims such as making them glowy, or applying trims on tools.
body:
This mod empowers users to add trims onto items besides armor. This supports all vanilla pickaxes, axes, shovels, swords, hoes, and shears out of the box.

 

Check out the expansions for the mod here!

 

Additionally, you can find a new smithing template that will make your trims glow in the dark when combined with armor or tools and a glow ink sac.

 

Trims on Tools supports these mods out of box:

  • Biomes O' Plenty
  • Elytra Trims

 

Permissions:

  • You can use this mod in your modpack.
  • You are not allowed to re-publish this mod to other sites without providing a CurseForge/Modrinth download link and my permission (PM to  Zeitheron, or via Discord)
  • You are not allowed to include this (or any other mods of the DragonForge team) in your own mod. Building add-ons, however, is allowed, but a friendly PM would be good.

Note:

  • The only supported version of Minecraft is the latest one that this mod exists for. DO NOT ASK TO DOWNGRADE!

Want to discuss anything? Need help with APIs?

Join the discord server and follow Zeitheron on Twitter!

If you would like to support my work, you can become a patron via  Patreon.
